All 6 items appear in the final property solution. (2) financing: includes loan amount, interest rate, term, monthly payment, down payment, arrangement fee—this constitutes a financing solution with terms—fully specified. (3) legal_services: includes provider, contact, cost, and services—fully specified. (4) moving_services: includes provider, contact, cost, services—fully specified.
